name: rdna_R1_R2_inserted_units
description: R1/R2 non-LTR retrotransposons specifically integrated into 28S rRNA sites in the X-NOR and Y-NOR rDNA arrays. R1 inserts at position 7008 of 28S, R2 at position 6049. 50-80% of rDNA units carry R1 or R2 insertions; these inserted units are not transcribed but provide diagnostic mapping anchors for rDNA copies.
expected_copy_count: 150-300 R1 copies, 100-200 R2 copies, all rDNA-embedded
